MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Continued To Dec-28-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Strike Objections, And Monetary Sanctions, Declaration Of Richard P. Brown And Declaration Of Dawn L. Hassell, Esq. In Support
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Charles Mclally for plaintiff and moving party: Bruce Sinor
Edsin S. Nakagawa for defendant and opposing party: Diamond Heights Village Association

No argument, submitted on tentative. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and for issue sanctions is granted in part. The motion is denied as to form interrogatory 12.2. Defendant is ordered to further respond to interrogatory 12.3 and indicate whether counsel for defendant interviewed any potential witness or instead received a list of potential witnesses who turned over their independently prepared statements. Statements written or recorded independently by witnesses are not work product and must be identified pursuant to the interrogatory.

The motion for monetary and issue sanctions is denied.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
